news.t: Harbor Capital Celebrates 3-Year Anniversary of Harbor Health Care ETF (MEDI)
Biotech is back. Here's why these rallying stocks belong in your portfolio now.

holdings.infoBox: MEDI is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 20.83%, Ascendis Pharma at 15.81%, Legend Biotech at 5.59%, Gilead Sciences at 4.17%, and Rhythm Pharmaceuticals at 3.73%.

overview.description: The Harbor Health Care ETF (MEDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a narrow portfolio of stocks engaged in the health care sector globally. MEDI was launched on Nov 16, 2022 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital Celebrates 3-Year Anniversary of Harbor Health Care ETF (MEDI)
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. (“Harbor”), a premier provider of investment solutions, is proud to celebrate the 3-year anniversary of the Harbor Health Care ETF (MEDI), an ac...

data.text: The volatile sector is seeing greater stability, and these four stocks can profit.
